name: explain-modify-fibonacci
system_prompt: You are a helpful coding assistant. Be concise and focus on the code.
turns: This is very slow for large n. Modify it to use memoization so repeated subproblems aren't recomputed.
Now show me an iterative version that uses O(1) space instead of the memoized version's O(n).
Write a comparison function that times all three versions (naive, memoized, iterative) for n=30 and prints the results.
Which version would you recommend for production use and why?
outcome_description: Response explains the exponential complexity and adds memoization (lru_cache, @cache, or dict-based)
